meta_title: For Freelancers: passive income to Solve no portfolio (Intermediate Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to passive income and overcome no portfolio. A Intermediate-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Passive Income to Solve No Portfolio
content.seo_description: Learn how to generate passive income and overcome a lack of portfolio. An intermediate-level guide using Antigravity and Claude Code to ship high-value projects.
content.answer_block: Stop chasing low-paying gigs to build a portfolio. Instead, build a niche-specific micro-SaaS using Antigravity and Claude Code. By automating the deployment of high-value utility tools, you create a public-facing asset that demonstrates technical authority, generates passive revenue, and acts as a living, breathing portfolio piece that attracts premium clients.
content.intro:
The cold reality of freelancing is a vicious cycle: you need clients to build a portfolio, but you need a portfolio to land clients. You're stuck in a loop of low-bid races to the bottom, burning hours on bespoke work that disappears into a private GitHub repository, never to be seen or monetized again.

It is time to stop being a digital laborer and start being an AI-powered product architect. By leveraging Antigravity and Claude Code, you can transform your technical skills into a self-sustaining asset. This isn't just about showing off code; it's about building a revenue-generating machine that proves your worth to prospective clients while you sleep.

steps.title: Define Your High-Value Utility
steps.description: Identify a repetitive manual task in a lucrative niche (e.g., SEO auditing for local businesses). The goal is to build a tool that solves a specific pain point.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Act as a Senior SaaS Architect. Identify 3 micro-SaaS opportunities for local real estate agents that solve data aggregation problems. Provide a feature list for the most viable option that can be built in under 48 hours.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Research and document the project architecture for a local real estate lead scraper'

steps.title: Scaffold the Infrastructure
steps.description: Use Antigravity to generate the boilerplate. This ensures your project follows industry best practices from line one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a Next.js 14, Tailwind CSS, and Supabase project. Include authentication, a secure API route for data processing, and a responsive dashboard layout.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Initialize the project structure using the Antigravity scaffold'

steps.title: Implement Core Business Logic
steps.description: Focus on the 'Passive' aspect. Build the automation engine that processes data without human intervention.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a robust Node.js service that fetches real-time market data from public APIs, processes it, and stores the results in Supabase. Include error handling and rate limiting.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Implement the data ingestion service and database schema'

steps.title: Establish the Public-Facing Portfolio Page
steps.description: Turn the tool into a marketing asset by creating a high-conversion landing page that explains the value proposition.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a high-converting landing page component that highlights the utility of the tool. Include a pricing section for a monthly subscription model.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Build the landing page and integrate Stripe for subscription payments'

steps.title: Deploy and Automate Monitoring
steps.description: Ship to production and ensure the system runs autonomously. Your portfolio now has a live URL.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure the deployment pipeline for Vercel and set up automated health checks to monitor the API performance.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Deploy the application and verify all production endpoints'

pro_tips: Always build for a niche you plan to target for high-ticket consulting; the tool becomes your sales deck.
Use Claude Code to write unit tests for your core logic; it increases your perceived value as a 'professional' developer.
Include a 'Powered by [Your Name]' footer in your SaaS to build personal branding.
Treat your passive income project as a 'Version 1.0'—never over-engineer, just ship and iterate based on user feedback.
Integrate a simple analytics dashboard to show prospective clients that you understand data-driven decision making.
content.next_steps: Once deployed, share the tool on LinkedIn and IndieHackers. Use the live URL as the primary link in your freelancer profile to demonstrate your capability to ship production-grade software.
content.conversion_block: You now have a live, revenue-generating asset that serves as the ultimate proof of competence. Stop waiting for permission and start building your authority today. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
